Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}It has been a while since we attended class.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 1 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The teachers and our classmates seemed to be doing well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 7 0 25 25}By the way, did you notice that Junpei-san was missing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}I saw him head for the rooftop before afternoon classes started.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Perhaps he decided to skip the first day of the semester?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seems like both Junpei and[n]Yukari are on the rooftop.[n]{f 1 1}
